com.irurueta.commons.units

Class Measurement<T extends Enum>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.commons.units.Measurement<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - a measurement unit.
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Distance

    public abstract class Measurement<T extends Enum>
extends Object
    Base class to define a measurement unit and value.
